title: Notification No.131/2015-Cus(NT), dated 24.11.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 131/2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 24th November, 2015 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Patparganj, Village Ghazipur, Delhi, to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on - (i) the Commissioner of Customs(Preventive), West Bengal, Kolkata, 15/1, Strand Road, Kolkata- 700001; (ii) the Principal Commissioner of Customs (Port), Visakhapatnam, Custom House, Port Ara, Visakhapatnam-530035; (iii) the Principal Commissioner of Customs & Central Excise, Nagpur-I, Telangkhedi Road, Civil Lines, Nagpur-440001; (iv) the Commissioner of Customs-IV, Chennai, 60, Rajaji Salai, Chennai-600001; (v) the Commissioner of Customs (Port), Kandla, Custom House, Near Balaji Temple, Kandla-370210; (vi) the Principal Commissioner of Customs (General), Mumbai, Zone-I, New Custom House, Ballard Estate, Mumbai-400001; (vii) the Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot Patparganj and other Inland Container Depots, Delhi, Village-Gazipur, Near Gazipur Bus Depot, New Delhi; (viii) the Principal Commissioner of Customs, Nhava Sheva-II, Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva, Tal: Uran, District Raigad, Maharashtra-400707, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to Shri Fahim Anwarbhai Zada, Proprietor, M/s Perfect Exports, H-3, Nishat Society, Adajan Patia, Rander Road, Surat, Gujarat, Pin-395009 and others issued vide show cause notice number 103/KOL/APP/2011/Exporter/Pt- Exporter/perfect Exports/8038-8047, dated the 19th March, 2015 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Kolkata Zonal Unit, Kolkata. [F No.437/69/2015-Cus.IV] (Z.R.Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
